sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (a DateTime, b Int32, c Float64, d String, e Nullable(String), f Date);
INSERT INTO fuzz_test VALUES (now() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, -200, -300.50, '', 'nullable', NULL);
SELECT a, minus(b, 20) AS subtract_value, minus(c, a) AS date_subtract, a / (minus(d, '0')) AS division_result FROM fuzz_test WHERE e IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a, b, c, f, minus((SELECT count() FROM fuzz_test WHERE e IS NULL), (SELECT count(*) FROM fuzz_test)) AS null_count_difference FROM fuzz_test;
SELECT a, b, e, a / NULLIF(b, 0) AS safe_division FROM fuzz_test HAVING safe_division > 0;

SELECT a, c, f, minus(a, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) AS days_difference, (a / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fuzz_test WHERE e IS NULL)) AS average_time_per_row FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY a, c, f HAVING days_difference < 10;
SELECT e, count() AS total_count, minus(avg(c), 100) AS average_adjusted FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY e HAVING average_adjusted > 0;
SELECT f, minus(max(a), min(a)) AS date_span, flatten(arrayJoin([minus(b, 50), b / 2])) AS division_transform FROM fuzz_test WHERE date_span IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_test AS SELECT a, minus(b, 10) AS adjusted_b FROM fuzz_test WHERE e IS NOT NULL;
